Department Chair's Message

MENU

Prof. Mehmet Reşat Başar

Head of Department

The Department of Architecture within the Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture aims to train qualified, competent, innovative and creative designers in a broad spectrum of micro to macro scale with an interdisciplinary education approach. Accordingly, the architecture department has embraced the principle of nurturing entrepreneurial, and research-oriented professionals who possess analytical thinking skills, engage in information-driven researches, synthesize knowledge effectively, address environmental challenges, and generate solutions. These professionals value historical and cultural legacies, prioritize sustainability in design, integrate national identity with global perspectives, embrace technological advancements, uphold ethical values, and are prepared to compete on both national and international platforms.
